modal.example: Service-driven modal examples using ngx-bootstrap with a restrained visual style aligned with the rest of the library.

confirmation.message: This action archives the current record and can be reverted later from history.
confirmation.title: Archive current record

error.message: The request could not be completed. Review the connection or try again in a few seconds.
error.title: Something went wrong

info.message: The record was synchronized successfully and the latest version is already available to the team.
info.title: Synchronization completed

warning.message: There are pending changes in this section. If you continue, they will be replaced by the last saved version.
warning.title: Review pending changes

canceled.message: The archive action was canceled and no changes were applied.
canceled.title: Action canceled

confirmed.message: The record was queued for archive and the process will finish in the background.
confirmed.title: Action confirmed
